title: Databank (original)
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref}}
{{Youmay|the older version of the Databank|[[Databank (2014-)|the current official version]] or [[Memory bank/Legends|the in-universe storage device]]|linebreak=1}}
[[File:StarWars_Databank.jpg|thumb|right|250px]]
The '''Databank''', formerly found on [[StarWars.com]], was in its time the only official ''[[Star Wars]]'' database available to the public. Entries were sorted alphabetically within several categories. Each entry was split into three sections, wherever it was applicable: the first described things as seen in the films (if at all), the second explored additional information from the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]], and the third looked behind the scenes.

Most entries were written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]]. The ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] allowed fans to write Databank entries on the more obscure characters, vehicles, species and locations of the saga.<ref name="Vault">{{SWArchive|url=vault/databank|text=Star Wars Databank}}</ref>

Following the official ''Star Wars'' site's overhaul on [[September 13]], [[2011]], the Databank was replaced by the [[Encyclopedia (StarWars.com)|Encyclopedia]] feature, with all original Databank entries removed following the revamping.
